name: remotion-plugin
description: Compose branded videos from AI clips using Remotion. Takes a shot-list of MP4s + brand config and renders a final MP4 with logos, text overlays, transitions, captions, and voiceover.
author: AGNT

schema.title: Remotion Compose
schema.description: Render a branded video from a shot-list of AI video clips. Typically fed by seedance-api and elevenlabs-api outputs. Produces a final MP4 with brand typography, logos, and captions.

shots.description: Array of shot objects: [{filePath, durationFrames, overlayText?}, ...]. filePath is the MP4 from seedance-api. durationFrames is clip length in frames.

height.description: Output video height in pixels (1920 for 9:16 vertical, 1080 for 16:9 horizontal)

brandPrimary.description: Primary brand color (hex). Used for titles and highlights.

brandAccent.description: Accent brand color (hex). Used for CTA buttons and glow effects.

backgroundColor.description: Background color for letterboxing and non-video moments

titleText.description: Optional: Big title text displayed in the first shot

ctaText.description: Optional: Call-to-action text displayed in the last shot

voiceoverPath.description: Optional: Local path to voiceover MP3 (from elevenlabs-api TEXT_TO_SPEECH output)

musicUrl.description: Optional: URL or path to background music track

projectId.description: Optional: Reuse an existing Remotion project directory (speeds up re-renders, skips npm install)

skipInstall.description: Skip `npm install` step (use if project already installed)

filePath.description: Absolute path to the final rendered MP4

projectDir.description: Persisted Remotion project directory (reusable for re-renders)

renderDurationMs.description: How long the render took in milliseconds
